title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at ITC Limited Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at ITC Limited Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited Digital Technologies:
ITC Limited Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited Digital Technologies!
